scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,admin -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=@bleu-calanque/api" "wait-on tcp:3001 && npm run dev --workspace=@bleu-calanque/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bleu-calanque/shared && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.postinstall: npm run build -w @bleu-calanque/shared && npm run db:generate
